_comment: Snapshot of the legacy welcome/rules/stream/dev channels at v0.126.0. The channel set is being reduced to just general + announcements; this preserves the existing message text so it can seed the future dedicated /welcome and /rules pages (BUG-036 follow-up). Operators with custom content in these channels should migrate it before deleting via the cog modal — the fixed delete (BUG-036, v0.125.0) makes deletes stick across restarts.

welcome.intent: First-touch onboarding for new server members. Migrate to /welcome page (server-customizable from data/server/welcome.json).

messages.content:
🌍 **Welcome to Humanity Network!**

This is a cooperative, open-source platform built by and for humanity. We believe in individual sovereignty, collective action, and building a better world together.

**What is this place?**

HumanityOS is a decentralized hub connecting people across skills, projects, quests, and goals. Every person here is a node in a network working toward shared flourishing.

**Getting started:**
• Set up your profile at /profile
• Browse your skills at /skills
• Track personal goals at /quests
• Connect with others in #general
• Watch or broadcast at /streams

**How to connect with people:**
Left-click or right-click any username in the user list to follow, message, or view their profile. Mutual follows unlock direct messages.

**The project is open-source.**
Contribute at: https://github.com/Shaostoul/Humanity
Live at: https://united-humanity.us

We're glad you're here. 💚

rules.intent: Per-server community guidelines. Migrate to /rules page that renders data/server/rules.json + active local_rule governance proposals layered on top of the Humanity Accord.

messages.content:
📋 **Community Guidelines**

By participating in Humanity Network, you agree to uphold these principles. This is a space for genuine human connection — treat it accordingly.

**1. Respect Every Person**
Every participant is a human being deserving dignity. No harassment, hate speech, doxxing, or targeted attacks. Disagreement is fine; contempt is not.

**2. Act in Good Faith**
Communicate honestly. No deception, manipulation, or bad-faith arguments. If you made a mistake, own it. We're all learning.

**3. Protect Privacy**
Do not share others' personal information without consent. Your identity here is yours. Respect the same for others.

**4. Keep It Legal**
No illegal content, piracy, threats, or fraud. Content that harms children in any way results in immediate permanent ban and reporting to authorities.

**5. Stay On Topic**
Channels exist for a reason. Keep conversations relevant. Use #general for broad discussion, and dedicated channels for their purpose.

**6. Build, Don't Burn**
This platform is about creating something meaningful. Constructive criticism is welcome. Nihilism and chaos are not.

**Enforcement:**
Violations are handled by mods and admins. Progressive: warning → mute → kick → ban. Severe violations skip straight to ban.

👇 Use the button below to acknowledge these rules and unlock full access.

stream.intent: Originally a placeholder for stream chat. Streaming functionality is server-side; this channel was redundant. Dropped at v0.126.0; no migration target.

messages.content: 📡 **#stream** — This channel is for stream chat, stream announcements, and discussing live content. You can read and participate here without having a stream open. When you're live, your viewers' messages appear here too.

dev.intent: Originally a placeholder for dev discussion. Dropped at v0.126.0; no migration target.
